macro.title: Trump executive order targets regulatory barriers to homebuilding
macro.what: The White House announced on Friday afternoon its effort to challenge what it calls “unnecessary regulatory barriers” to homebuilding by issuing a broad executive order to reduce environmental, permitting and programmatic restrictions that federal officials say are contributing to the nation’s housing affordability crisis
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Local investors outpace builders in delivering starter homes
housing.what: A New Western report says independent investors delivered 120,193 homes in the starter segment during 2025.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.
